reviews.review_description: Bought this as a replacement for dragon front. However online multiplayer doesn't work. Even once you have selected a friend and chosen your deck and then press continue u just get a blank board and "searching for opponent" on top of it. So disappointed

This is a fun game. Great concept. 4 stars because I am praying the developers aren't done yet. There is still a bit of refining to do to improve the user experience but what I'm most excited about is expansion. This game could seriously kick a$$ down the road with more content.

Things I would like to see improved please
- better camera angle

    I tried playing in my chair and I had to bury my chin into my neck to see my cards and end turn button. Standing is probably fine but...

- previewing a card before playing

    Because new comers don't have all the stuff memorized right away and being committed when clicking without knowing what your clicking is rough. It doesn't take long to get to a point where it doesn't matter but it's the little things done to refine a game that make it great.

All in $3 well spent in my opinion. Thank you for the game.

developer_response.body: Thanks! Did you know there is a feature in Settings to change the camera height from 3 different angles? Try it out if not - you may like one over the others. Hope this helps!

reviews.review_description:
Add more tables and more modes. A little diversity will make it better...

There's a mini-game in Castlevania: Lords of Shadow, go check it out.
Either do that, or reach that level.

Then it will be much playable. But as it is now... I played it once and it's enough... :|
Everytime i select my team, the game just shows me a blank surface. In the bottom corner, it keeps saying CREATING ACCOUNT. Ive tried to keep the game on for several minutes but still the same.

I like chess. I'm not sure why but I was bored by the end of the tutorial. It does pretty much what it says in the description. The teleporting is a bit eratic and the motion controller's beam is difficult to aim sometimes as the controller is to close to the virtual ground.
Looks good so far and i will update as i play more. Wish i didnt have to stare straight down to play though, as quite uncomfortable on the neck.

What a mess has the potential to be a good game but the sound is all messed up and the view is horrible moves on it own and keeps getting worse then it's unplayable 0/10 I want my money back
Playing on galaxy s8 plus

reviews.review_title: It's like HoloChess from Stars Wars!!

reviews.review_description: I love the game but i can't figure out how to select different hero's or monsters for your deck.

developer_response.body: Hi! You just choose a Battle Mode (AI or MP) then choose your team. You can Save Teams also to make this process faster. Let us know if you need more help! Email us at info@happygiant.com - thx!

reviews.review_description: board game in VR... not totally taking advantage of what VR is capable of, but still fun

reviews.review_title: Doesn't run on Note 5 or Note 9
reviews.review_description: Always stuck at "creating new account", reinstalling does not help. Does anyone know how to make it work?
One of the most fun, best looking games I've seen on gear so far. Well Done!
Super Fun, Cool Battle Graphics and Great Strategy!

reviews.review_title: Potential to be a top VR game
reviews.review_description: If this game ends up with more characters and some nice background music along with trap cards, I can see it become very big on the VR. The design and concept is amazing. The multiplayer did not work for me (but I'm sure they're working on it). Being able to unlock monsters from hundreds of choices and maybe having some cinematic scenes will also spice up the game. Overall I see the potential of this game. And it is worth the money. This game is off to a good start. People should give it a try because if the developers continue with this game, they'll do very well on the VR platform
It's good for what it is, haven't played mp yet. It said it's like a ccg, but I don't see where you get more monsters?
